info.longName: iShares iBonds Oct 2031 Term TIPS ETF

funds_data.description: The index consists of inflation-protected public obligations of the U.S. Treasury, commonly known as “TIPS,” that are scheduled to mature between January 1, 2031 and October 15, 2031, inclusive. The fund will invest at least 80% of its assets in the component securities of the underlying index.

top_holdings.Name: BlackRock Cash Funds Treasury SL Agency
